data.current_description: Create a new lesson
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new lesson in a course
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new lesson within a course. Requires authentication. Accepts lesson details such as title, content, and course association in the request body. Returns the created lesson object with a unique lesson ID. The lesson will be added to the specified course and available to course participants.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is too minimal and lacks critical details about inputs (what fields are required/optional), outputs (what is returned), authentication requirements, and side effects (lesson becomes available to participants). Added context about request body expectations, return value structure, and operational effects for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getVideos' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing summary. Description lacks clarity about return format (array structure), pagination behavior, authentication requirements, and what metadata is included in video objects. These details are essential for AI agents to understand how to process and use the returned data.

data.current_description: Get all of the Heartbeat native videos in your community
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all native videos in community
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all Heartbeat native videos available in the community. Requires authentication. Returns an array of video objects containing metadata such as title, description, duration, and video URL. Results may be paginated depending on the number of videos. Use this operation to list all video content available to community members.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks clarity about return format (array structure), pagination behavior, authentication requirements, and what metadata is included in video objects. These details are essential for AI agents to understand how to process and use the returned data.

message: Operation 'getDocuments' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_context. Missing summary. Description mentions pagination but lacks details about specific pagination parameters (cursor, limit), authentication requirements, and how to use the cursor for navigation. Added parameter guidance and clarified that results include pagination metadata for better AI agent usability.

data.current_description: Return an array of all documents (wiki posts) within a Heartbeat community. Results are paginated using cursor-based pagination.
data.summary_suggestion: List all documents with cursor pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all documents (wiki posts) within the Heartbeat community with cursor-based pagination support. Requires authentication. Accepts pagination parameters (cursor and limit) to control result set size and navigation. Returns an array of document objects with metadata and a cursor for fetching the next page of results. Use pagination parameters to efficiently retrieve large document collections.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description mentions pagination but lacks details about specific pagination parameters (cursor, limit), authentication requirements, and how to use the cursor for navigation. Added parameter guidance and clarified that results include pagination metadata for better AI agent usability.

data.current_description: Get a document by ID, including its content
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a document by ID with full content
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific document (wiki post) by its unique ID, including the complete document content. Requires authentication and a valid documentID path parameter. Returns a document object containing metadata (title, author, creation date, etc.) and the full document content. Use this operation when you need to access a specific document's details and body text.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is minimal and lacks clarity about authentication requirements, the required documentID parameter, what metadata is included in the response, and the distinction between document metadata and content. Enhanced to clarify input requirements and output structure for AI agent interpretation.

data.current_description: Create a new Group in a Heartbeat community
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new group in the community
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new group within the Heartbeat community. Requires authentication. Accepts group configuration details in the request body. Returns the newly created Group object with its assigned ID and metadata.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks context about authentication requirements, what inputs are expected, and what is returned. Added these details to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

Added specificity about the groupID parameter requirement, authentication, and what is returned to help AI agents understand this is a retrieval operation for a specific resource.

data.current_description: Get a group

data.current_description: Create a new pending user in a Heartbeat community. A pending user does not yet existing within the community. However, the first time they attempt to log in, they will be created as a user within the community. If this is called for a pending user that already exists, it will update the pending user. If this is called for a user that already exists within the community, it will return an error.
data.summary_suggestion: Create or update a pending user
data.description_suggestion: Creates a pending user account in the Heartbeat community or updates an existing pending user. Pending users are pre-registered but not yet active - they become full users upon their first login. Requires user profile information in the request body. Returns the pending user object. Returns an error if called for an already-active community user. Use this to pre-register users before they join the community.
data.reasoning: Original description is verbose and unclear about the operation's purpose. Added concise summary. Reorganized description to clarify the pending user concept upfront, simplified the conditional logic explanation, and added context about when to use this operation. Improved AI agent interpretability by explaining the user lifecycle.
